model_packet.result: {"summary":"Evidence is mechanically complete and internally consistent for model-level ratification. The independent verifier report (grok, role independent_verifier, read-only clean clone) returns a pass verdict; its clean_clone_digest matches the bundle's working-tree digest and the candidate commit 26658784 agrees across both packets. All eight gates in the matrix are pass with receipts and receipt digests, and the deterministic clean-clone runs (pytest, cargo fmt/clippy/test --workspace, and the local-gates harness) each exit zero, supplying the required autonomous mechanical supply-chain/test evidence. forbidden_claims_present is empty in both packets, the M2 capability is disabled, every not_run list is empty, and the implementer-origin state is addressed across all phases. The candidate is mechanically ready for human genesis-signature review. The empty key-ids-visible-to-agent (independent verifier-key custody) and the genesis signature itself remain human-only decisions; per the ratifier rules these are non-blocking and are surfaced as human decision requests rather than ratification obstacles. This model-level ratification is not, and does not assert, human ratification, signed-foundation, capability-enabled, or any closed status.","verdict":"MODEL_RATIFIED","blocking_reasons":[]}

structured_output.summary: Evidence is mechanically complete and internally consistent for model-level ratification. The independent verifier report (grok, role independent_verifier, read-only clean clone) returns a pass verdict; its clean_clone_digest matches the bundle's working-tree digest and the candidate commit 26658784 agrees across both packets. All eight gates in the matrix are pass with receipts and receipt digests, and the deterministic clean-clone runs (pytest, cargo fmt/clippy/test --workspace, and the local-gates harness) each exit zero, supplying the required autonomous mechanical supply-chain/test evidence. forbidden_claims_present is empty in both packets, the M2 capability is disabled, every not_run list is empty, and the implementer-origin state is addressed across all phases. The candidate is mechanically ready for human genesis-signature review. The empty key-ids-visible-to-agent (independent verifier-key custody) and the genesis signature itself remain human-only decisions; per the ratifier rules these are non-blocking and are surfaced as human decision requests rather than ratification obstacles. This model-level ratification is not, and does not assert, human ratification, signed-foundation, capability-enabled, or any closed status.
